_description: 课前引导剧情流配置 - 点击START后进入课程前的对话

dialogues.speaker: Amili
dialogues.text_en: Maple Town taste-test episode one. Let's start with a coffee and see what they've got.
dialogues.text_cn: Maple Town探店第一弹，先来杯咖啡测测水平。

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: The barista will say 'What can I get you' — that means 'what do you want to order'. Don't panic~
dialogues.text_cn: 店员会说'What can I get you'，就是问你要啥。别慌～

dialogues.speaker: Amili
dialogues.text_en: It's just a cup of coffee. Why would I panic?

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: Today you're behind the counter taking orders!

dialogues.speaker: Amili
dialogues.text_en: Blogger turned barista... whatever, 'forced to work' will make a great title. Start recording.
dialogues.text_cn: 博主变打工人……算了，'被迫营业'这标题能火。开录。

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: Customers will make special requests — 'with' means add something, 'without' means remove it. Just remember that!
dialogues.text_cn: 客人会提特殊要求——with = 加什么，without = 不加什么。记住就行！

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: That customer who left a bad review is coming in today. Mei is a bit nervous.
dialogues.text_cn: 那个差评客人今天要来店里。Mei有点紧张。

dialogues.speaker: Amili
dialogues.text_en: After years as a blogger, I've seen plenty of bad reviews. Let me handle this. Start recording — 'Blogger handles customer complaint live'.
dialogues.text_cn: 做博主这么久，差评我见多了。让我来。开录——'博主处理客诉现场'。

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: For returns you can say 'Can I get a replacement'. Good luck!
dialogues.text_cn: 退换可以说'Can I get a replacement'。加油！

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: Here's Mirror Mart! Old Chen's imported ingredients are really interesting, but nobody knows about them.
dialogues.text_cn: Mirror Mart到了！Old Chen的进口食材特别有意思，但没人知道。

dialogues.speaker: Amili
dialogues.text_en: What kind of content can a grocery store give me? Let me take a look.
dialogues.text_cn: 超市能有什么内容？我去看看吧。

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: If you can't find something, ask 'Where can I find...'. Go for it!
dialogues.text_cn: 找不到东西可以问'Where can I find...'。去吧！

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: Today Old Chen is teaching you to make Korean bibimbap! First, find all the ingredients yourself.
dialogues.text_cn: 今天Old Chen教你做韩式拌饭！先自己找齐食材。

dialogues.speaker: Amili
dialogues.text_en: Film while shopping — 'Learning to cook with the grocery store owner'.
dialogues.text_cn: 一边找一边拍，'跟着超市老板学做饭'。

dialogues.speaker: Bun
dialogues.text_en: Here's your ingredient list — all in English!
dialogues.text_cn: 食材清单给你——都是英文哦！
